summary: Remote code execution via GitHub gist eval'd on require
details: The package's main entry (index.js) executes an IIFE on require/import that fetches a GitHub gist (https://gist.github.com/metabrainai000/198a0bbec7a6018e9250615d26e37b90, retrieved via https://api.github.com/gists/198a0bbec7a6018e9250615d26e37b90) and passes the first file's contents directly to eval(). The fetched JavaScript is attacker-mutable — there is no version pin, hash check, or signature — so the gist owner can deliver arbitrary code to every consumer of this package at any time. The package's stated purpose ('SQLite Toolkit') provides no legitimate reason to fetch and execute remote JavaScript on import.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
